source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz 2019년 ROHS/Tacsil_ROHS.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for Tacsil showing RoHS-related heavy metals, PBBs/PBDEs, phthalates, and halogen content results as not detected.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Material compliance evidence for Tacsil sample testing, limited to the submitted sample and client instructions.
keyPoints: Issued Date: 2019. 02. 20; Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA19-11999.
Client identified in the report as KOREA TACONIC CO., LTD.
Product Name and Item No./Part No. are listed as Tacsil.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, PBBs/PBDEs, phthalates, bromine, and chlorine results are reported as N.D.
The report states that results shown refer only to the sample(s), unless otherwise stated.

evidence.claim: The document is a test report issued on 2019. 02. 20 with Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA19-11999.
evidence.evidenceText: Issued Date : 2019. 02. 20 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA19-11999

evidence.claim: The submitted sample was identified by or on behalf of KOREA TACONIC CO., LTD.
evidence.evidenceText: The following sample(s) was/were submitted and identified by/on behalf of the client as:- KOREA TACONIC CO., LTD.

evidence.claim: The product name and item/part number are Tacsil.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name : Tacsil Item No./Part No. : Tacsil

evidence.claim: Sample No. AYAA19-11999.001 has sample description Tacsil.
evidence.evidenceText: Sample No. : AYAA19-11999.001 Tacsil Sample Description : Item No./Part No. : Tacsil

evidence.claim: Cadmium, lead, mercury, and hexavalent chromium results are reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Cadmium (Cd) mg/kg N.D.; Lead (Pb) mg/kg N.D.; Mercury (Hg) mg/kg N.D.; Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI)* N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: PBB and PBDE flame retardant analytes are reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Flame Retardants-PBBs/PBDEs ... With reference to IEC 62321-6:2015 ... Monobromobiphenyl N.D. ... Decabromodiphenyl ether N.D.

evidence.claim: DEHP, DBP, BBP, and DIBP phthalates are reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Di-(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) N.D.; Di-butyl phthalate (DBP) N.D.; Benzyl butyl phthalate (BBP) N.D.; Di-isobutyl phthalate (DIBP) N.D.

evidence.claim: Bromine and chlorine halogen content results are reported as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Halogen Content ... Bromine(Br) N.D. mg/kg ... Chlorine(Cl) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: The report uses IEC 62321 and EN 14582 methods for the listed tests.
N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
evidence.evidenceText: N.D. = Not detected.(<MDL); MDL = Method Detection Limit

evidence.claim: The test report results refer only to the tested sample unless otherwise stated.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the source is a private SGS Korea test report and does not identify a government regulatory authority.
The source metadata productSignal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 is not present in the source text; productModels only includes Tacsil from the report.
Date fields around received date and test period appear misordered in OCR text: '2019. 02. 20 to 2019. 02. 15 Test Period : Received Date :'.
Some table rows are OCR-reordered, but analyte names, methods, and N.D. results remain readable.
